title: (Bearish Signal) EDIT enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Mar 24, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that EDIT's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 101 similar cases where EDIT's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 83 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $40.88 crossed the resistance line at $44.08 and is trading between $44.08 resistance and $36.16 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/22/21 - 03/24/21, the price experienced a -22% Downtrend. During the week of 03/17/21 - 03/24/21, the stock fell -12%.

https://preview.redd.it/2omjc955j7p61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=14dfb4b1586f03a462318578906497c0ffc4af1f

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 24, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on EDIT as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 83 of 101 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

EDIT moved below its 50-day Moving Average on February 10, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for EDIT crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on February 05, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 13 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 77%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where EDIT declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

EDIT broke above its upper Bollinger Band on December 03, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for EDIT entered a downward trend on March 16, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10161055-editas-medicine-edit-40-99-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-mar-24-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
